summary: Bug fix testing COMPLETE for Retos (Challenges) navigation issue. All 8 test cases PASSED. Previously, all challenges navigated to /entrenamiento/practica without parameters (defaulting to Level 1 Exercise 1 'Move the King'). The fix now correctly maps each challenge to the appropriate practice exercise via URL params. All 4 unlocked challenges navigate correctly and show the correct chess pieces, and the 2 locked challenges correctly block navigation.

success_rate.backend: N/A (frontend-only app, all data is MOCKED)

challenge_list_renders.details: All 6 challenges render on /retos page: Captura la Torre, Jaque con Caballo, Mate en 1 (Torre), Mate en 1 (Reina), Doble ataque (locked), Mate en 2 (locked)

captura_la_torre.details: Challenge navigates to /entrenamiento/practica?level=3&exercise=3. Exercise title shows 'Captura la Torre'. Board correctly displays white Bishop (♗) and black Rook (♜) - NOT a King as before the fix

jaque_con_caballo.details: Challenge navigates to /entrenamiento/practica?level=3&exercise=4. Exercise title shows 'Jaque con Caballo'. Board correctly displays white Knight (♘) and black King (♚)

mate_en_1_torre.details: Challenge navigates to /entrenamiento/practica?level=4&exercise=1. Exercise title shows 'Mate en 1 (Torre)'. Board correctly displays white Rook (♖), white King (♔), and black King (♚)

mate_en_1_reina.details: Challenge navigates to /entrenamiento/practica?level=4&exercise=2. Exercise title shows 'Mate en 1 (Reina)'. Board correctly displays white Queen (♕), black King (♚), and black pawns (♟)

locked_challenges.details: Both locked challenges (Doble ataque, Mate en 2) are NOT clickable. Clicking on them does NOT navigate away from /retos page. They show lock icons and 'Avanzado' difficulty badges

login_flow.details: Enter app as 'Alumno' role from welcome screen works correctly. Select Alumno radio + click 'Ingresar' button navigates to /inicio

navigation_to_retos.details: Navigation to /retos from sidebar 'Retos' link works correctly

bug_verification.original_bug: All challenges navigated to /entrenamiento/practica without parameters, defaulting to Level 1 Exercise 1 (Move the King). This caused wrong chess pieces to display.
bug_verification.fix_applied: ChallengesPage.jsx handleChallengeClick function now maps each challenge ID to correct practice exercise URLs with level and exercise params
bug_verification.fix_verified: YES - All challenges now navigate to correct exercises with correct chess pieces displayed
bug_verification.root_cause: Missing URL parameters in challenge navigation routes
files_involved: /app/frontend/src/components/pages/ChallengesPage.jsx - handleChallengeClick maps challenge IDs to URLs
/app/frontend/src/components/pages/TrainingPages.jsx - PracticePage reads level/exercise from URL params

test_credentials: No credentials needed - demo app with role selection (Alumno)

mocked_api.details: Entire app is frontend-only prototype with no backend. All data is hardcoded in mockData.js and component files.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Retos bug fix verified and working. Challenge navigation uses URL params ?level=X&exercise=Y. PRACTICE_EXERCISES in ChessBoard.jsx contains all board configurations. Level 3 exercises 3 and 4 are the new additions for this bug fix. Testing approach: login as Alumno, navigate to /retos, click each unlocked challenge, verify URL params and chess pieces displayed.
